subject: disco of the future meeting 10/24/01 agenda and materials

emails.subject: FW: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.subject_base: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.body: FW: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials Are these papers consistent with Enron's positions? Jim To: hduncan@caem.org

emails.subject: RE: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.subject_base: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.body: RE: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials Unless you sent me a list of Distribution Enron's positions (as the attached document for the RTOs) I will prepare a summary of their recommendations trying to identify in which extent they allow the implementation of effective wholesale and retail competition. Please let me know if this is ok with you. Guille To: Canovas, Guillermo

emails.subject: RE: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.subject_base: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.body: sounds good. pls talk with Bob Frank about his involvement in this group. Jim To: Steffes, James D.

emails.subject: RE: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.subject_base: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.body: RE: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials Attached are summarized the main recommendations of the distco of the future paper and their impact. Most recommendations would have a positive impact on competition. However, some recommendations could be potentially dangerous. Besides, it does not have a clear position regarding unbundling: it opens too many unbundling possibilities and discards the extreme, and more effective (divestiture). I will work on the default supplier paper today. To: Canovas, Guillermo

emails.subject: FW: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.subject_base: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials

emails.subject: RE: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.subject_base: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.body: A few notes. 1. Be cautious about divestiture. Remember we own pipes and a electric LDC. 2. Agree with you that we don't want Utility in merchant role key issue. 3. POLR issue involves getting pricing right. Why don't you put together a note to the CAEM that we can send as our thoughts. Just the Top 5 issues. Jim To: Steffes, James D.

emails.subject: RE: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.subject_base: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.body: Fine. Which is the deadline? To: Canovas, Guillermo

emails.subject: RE: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.subject_base: DISCO of the Future Meeting 10/24/01 Agenda and Materials
emails.body: Try to respond end of the week. I'd like to see your drafts. Jim To: Steffes, James D.
